lastReleaseMessage: Doc and config follow-up to the v0.14.4 hardening pass. DESIGN.md api sections now describe the shipped behavior: rules validation and real change counts, preview LIKE escaping, transactions_live read paths, clamped analytics params, guardCents on budgets, single-query stats with archived count. Dependabot now ignores react-family major bumps so react and react-dom can only move as a pair, closing the mismatch that PR 7 introduced.

barRaise.topFinding: Full pass on the v0.14.4 hardening release; health holds at 89 (working). All four hard rules verified live (D-006 loopback bind at server.ts:1256, D-003 integer cents, D-001 no importer outbound, D-004/D-007 backup-then-fail-503), pnpm audit clean at high+, and every version pill reads 0.14.4. The one substantive new gap: POST /api/transactions/bulk-delete (server.ts:534) permanently deletes rows with no pre-delete snapshot, the only user-facing destructive path that skips the createBackup step every other mutating route takes (two lenses flagged it MED). A second MED: scripts/push-to-github.ps1:28-31 still blind-deletes .git/index.lock before its Assert-GitSafe guard, the FUSE-corruption race v0.14.4 removed from release.ps1/preship.ps1 but missed here, and release.ps1 delegates its push to it. Also actionable: narrow the wildcard yesandeverything.com CORS grant to the GET probe route, and reconcile the Budget audit/resources Discord webhook wiring against the naming standard. Prior dependency-01 (cut v0.14.4) is closed; the security destructive-endpoint token-guard stays a deferred security-vs-solo-ux tradeoff, now 4 runs open.
